title: Passengers begin evacuating cruise ship hit by hantavirus
summary_full: Spanish passengers taken off MV Hondius by medical teams in hazmat suits after being screened for the infectionCruise ship hantavirus outbreak – latest updatesAn evacuation has begun of passengers aboard a cruise ship at the centre of a deadly outbreak of hantavirus.Spanish passengers wearing blue plastic ponchos and hair coverings were brought off the vessel by medical teams in hazmat suits on Sunday morning after being screened for the infection.
